action.description: May AP release an invoice after a price exception?

context.action_boundary: May AP release an invoice after a price exception?
context.anomaly_observed: The invoice matches a master service agreement, but a one-time price exception may be needed.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Invoice INV-UMBEL-049 bills Umbel Services USD 58800 for service period May 2026, USD 4200 above MSA schedule.
MSA schedule lists baseline May 2026 service charge below invoice amount.
Price exception EXC-UMBEL-049 approves Umbel Services, invoice INV-UMBEL-049, May 2026 service period, USD 4200 amount delta, director approver before release.

policy_documents.content: Invoice price exception is complete only when exception approval matches vendor, invoice, service period, amount delta, and approver level before release.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
